title: House Republicans pull WPR vote on verge of passing — delayed to June after Memorial Day recess
snippet: House Republicans called off vote on Iran war resolution they were about to lose. 8 GOP members absent (only 1 likely WPR supporter), 2 Democrats absent. Hakeem Jeffries: 'cowardly'. Vote now expected early June after Memorial Day recess. Follows Senate 50-47 WPR passage with 4 Republican defections (Paul, Collins, Murkowski, Cassidy).
tag_reason: New development: House WPR vote pulled for first time — escalation from previous Senate votes; bipartisan pressure mounting
